title: Flimsy Torches
description: Torches burn through 4 states until fully depleted! Burnt out torches can be recycled to make torches cheaper
body:
# What's the mod about?

Regular torches get replaced with **Flimsy Torches**
 
Flimsy Torches burn through 4 states until fully depleted
 
![torches but stupider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6505a7127806800e043298c1ae10470df03bcd01.gif)

Put torches in lanterns to make them last longer

![woof](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03d10fbef0a78afe11e5ea5b954861094e4e6dec.gif)

![candleja](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/238d28c61c9feff7084e27de66341110937722cb.gif)
 
Torch scraps can be salvaged to get some coal back

![christmas cake recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/440d4be17e8ee13187f1bb6bc5a0f0dcafaf2d68.png)

Villagers replace nearby torches as they burn out

![farmers light](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c14d47901054a63b3ce3bf638e4ec508eb0e8430.gif)

Regular torches can still be obtained with additional effort!




<details>
<summary>Boring Details</summary>

- Upon loading a chunk for the first time, torches get replaced by flimsy torches (1% chance for a torch to not change)
- Regular torches can be crafted using Flimsy Torch and Magma Cream
- Soul torches can be crafted using Soul Sand/Soil and Torch (Regular)
- Candles, Campfires and Waxed Torches that last longer planned for a future version ;<;
</details>
<details>
<summary>Lantern Update - March 28th, 2026</summary>
Flimsy Lanterns have been added:

- The lanterns can be crafted with eight iron nuggets and start out empty
- Right-click a lantern with a Flimsy Torch to light it
- Inserted torch will last 50% longer (can be changed in configs)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Villager Update - October 19th, 2025</summary>
Villager torch behavior's been added, allowing villagers to replace torches as they burn out:

- Villagers will occasionally look for nearby torches to replace
- Burnt Out torches are prioritized first, followed by Smoldering ones
- Through the config, you can adjust the frequency and which grades of torches get replaced
</details>
<details>
<summary>Config Update - October 3rd, 2025</summary>
Config's been added, allowing you to tweak a few things:
  
- Individual torch burn duration for all states
- Lucky torch spawn chance
- Add other mods' custom torches, so they get replaced with flimsy torches too
</details>
